summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five PR inventory items. No merge action is safe because no candidate has complete merge preflight with Codex /review proof. #75469 has a concrete replacement-fix path because the source branch is not maintainer-modifiable and has a failing check; #90122, #91093, and #92445 need maintainer decisions or complete merge preflight; #93183 is already closed.

actions.reason: Focused contributor/bot PR is useful but not currently mergeable; replacement repair is concrete and allowed by allow_fix_pr.
Build a narrow replacement fix artifact for the heartbeat commitment starvation regression.
Open a Clownfish replacement PR only after executor repair, validation, and review gates complete.
Potentially mergeable small UI fix, but merge_candidate is blocked by missing required merge preflight and unhydrated discussion context.
Broad feature PR requires maintainer review and complete hydrated discussion/review context before any merge or repair recommendation.
Author follow-up is active per label, so maintainer decision or refreshed author-response context is required before merge planning.
Already-closed PR is historical context only for this inventory shard.

needs_human: #90122 requires complete merge preflight before merge_candidate: live mergeability, hydrated discussion/review-bot context, Codex /review, and addressed findings are missing from the artifact.
#91093 is a broad XL feature/config/docs PR with 56 files and 86 unhydrated comments; maintainer review is required before merge or autonomous repair.
#92445 is labeled waiting on author, so maintainer or refreshed author-response context is required before finalization.

repair_candidate.summary: Replace uneditable source PR #75469 with a narrow Clownfish-owned fix for the heartbeat-runner regression where recurring due HEARTBEAT.md tasks can starve same-session inferred commitments indefinitely.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(heartbeat): deliver commitments after due tasks
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary

Replace source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/75469 with a narrow Clownfish-owned repair for the heartbeat-runner commitment starvation regression. The source branch is not maintainer-modifiable and the hydrated preflight shows checks-node-core-tooling failing, so this PR carries the fix forward on a repairable branch while preserving attribution.

## Credit

Based on source PR #75469 by clawsweeper[bot]. Clownfish preserves source PR credit and attribution for the original finding and patch direction.

## Validation

- pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/heartbeat-runner.commitments.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review must pass cleanly before merge.
credit_notes: Preserve attribution to source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/75469 and author clawsweeper[bot].
Replacement PR body should state that the patch is based on #75469 and carries source PR credit.

#92445 is labeled waiting on author, so maintainer or refreshed author-response context is required before finalization.
